channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: There’s Only 2 Weeks Until Sylvester Stallone & Jason Statham’s 4-Part Action Movie Series All Release On Netflix

item.description: Mac Jones isn’t exactly buying into the 49ers' viral practice facility conspiracy ... but he's not completely brushing it off either! The San Francisc...

item.title: Seattle Seahawks Win Super Bowl LX, Easily Handle New England Patriots
